title: VimFu — :%norm Append to Every Line
description: The :norm command executes normal mode keystrokes on every line in a range. :%norm runs on every line in the file.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
let x = 1
let y = 2
let z = 3
let w = 4
let v = 5

steps.say: Colon norm runs normal mode keystrokes on lines. Percent norm runs on every line in the file.
These JavaScript lines are missing semicolons. Add one to every line.
Every line now ends with a semicolon. Capital A goes to end of line, then the semicolon is typed. Norm does this on every line.
Percent norm. Execute any normal mode keys on every line. Incredibly powerful.
